parameters.query:
WITH current_prices AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, price
    FROM commodity_snapshots
    ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
),
resolved AS (
    UPDATE signals_log s
    SET 
        status = CASE
            WHEN s.direction = 'long' AND cp.price >= s.target_price THEN 'hit_target'
            WHEN s.direction = 'long' AND cp.price <= s.stop_price THEN 'hit_stop'
            WHEN s.direction = 'short' AND cp.price <= s.target_price THEN 'hit_target'
            WHEN s.direction = 'short' AND cp.price >= s.stop_price THEN 'hit_stop'
            WHEN NOW() >= s.valid_until THEN 'expired'
        END,
        exit_price = cp.price,
        resolved_at = NOW(),
        pnl_pct = CASE s.direction
            WHEN 'long' THEN ROUND(((cp.price - s.entry_price) / s.entry_price) * 100, 4)
            WHEN 'short' THEN ROUND(((s.entry_price - cp.price) / s.entry_price) * 100, 4)
        END,
        r_multiple = CASE s.direction
            WHEN 'long' THEN ROUND((cp.price - s.entry_price) / NULLIF(s.entry_price - s.stop_price, 0), 3)
            WHEN 'short' THEN ROUND((s.entry_price - cp.price) / NULLIF(s.stop_price - s.entry_price, 0), 3)
        END
    FROM current_prices cp
    WHERE s.status = 'open'
      AND cp.symbol = s.asset
      AND (
          (s.direction = 'long' AND (cp.price >= s.target_price OR cp.price <= s.stop_price))
          OR (s.direction = 'short' AND (cp.price <= s.target_price OR cp.price >= s.stop_price))
          OR NOW() >= s.valid_until
      )
    RETURNING s.id, s.asset, s.direction, s.entry_price, s.exit_price, s.target_price, s.stop_price, s.status, s.pnl_pct, s.r_multiple, s.conviction
)
SELECT * FROM resolved;

WITH current_prices AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, price

    ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
),
resolved AS (
    UPDATE signals_log s

            WHEN s.direction = 'short' AND cp.price >= s.stop_price THEN 'hit_stop'
            WHEN NOW() >= s.valid_until THEN 'expired'

        exit_price = cp.price,
        resolved_at = NOW(),

        END
    FROM current_prices cp
    WHERE s.status = 'open'
      AND cp.symbol = s.asset
      AND (
          (s.direction = 'long' AND (cp.price >= s.target_price OR cp.price <= s.stop_price))
          OR (s.direction = 'short' AND (cp.price <= s.target_price OR cp.price >= s.stop_price))

    RETURNING s.id, s.asset, s.direction, s.entry_price, s.exit_price, s.target_price, s.stop_price, s.status, s.pnl_pct, s.r_multiple, s.conviction
)
SELECT * FROM resolved;
